title: espeletia chontalensis
intro: Espeletia chontalensis, also known as the Chontalensis, is a plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae), native to Mexico. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, derived from its leaves and roots. The health benefits of Espeletia chontalensis include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of the plant are typically dried and used to make infusions or teas, which are consumed for their medicinal properties.
